Judge Reasons 判决理由全集

本页汇集项目留存的全部 LLM-judge 判决理由原文。第 1 节是现役第 4 代管线的 GLM-5.2 deliverable verifier（2026-07-06/07，148 条，Trajectory Lens 的 run 详情里也可见）；第 2 节是第 2 代 J-judge 体系（claude-4.7-opus，2026-05/06， 3915 条判分理由，体系已被 m_v2 规则指标取代，理由文本作为历史证据保留）。 原始 thinking 轨迹各代均未存储，本页为 judge 输出的结构化 reason 字段。 ← Home · Trajectory Lens

1. GLM-5.2 Verifier（第4代，deliverable 判决，n=148）

sampleresolvedscoreconfreason
Altran-PT-GDC__Robot-Framework-Mainframe-3270-Library-93✓0.90.9Replaced whitespace splitting with shlex.split() to support shell-like quoted arguments, matching the PR requirement with a minimal change.
Azure__pykusto-22✓0.850.8The fix correctly modifies __add__ to walk the other query's chain and attach self at the base, preserving multi-step queries, and uses a custom copy helper to avoid deepcopy issues; all tests pass.
Blaizzy__mlx-vlm-179✓0.850.8The agent correctly aligned the trainer's prepare_inputs call with the current dict-returning signature, fixing both reported errors.
CS-SI__eodag-381✓0.90.85The agent added a downloaded_callback parameter threaded through download_all/download across core, product, and all download plugins, plus a DownloadedCallback base class, satisfying the PR requirement.
DataDog__datadog-lambda-python-214✓0.90.9The agent correctly added Decimal to the numeric isinstance check in tag_object, preventing the TypeError when tagging DynamoDB responses.
Fatal1ty__mashumaro-189✗0.20.7The agent references spec.builder.get_type_name_identifier but the edits show no creation of this method on CodeBuilder, so the fix is incomplete and would fail at runtime.
GjjvdBurg__paper2remarkable-43✓0.950.9The fix correctly wraps subprocess.call in try/except FileNotFoundError so missing pdftk falls back to qpdf instead of crashing, with minimal changes and preserved behavior.
Luke-Poeppel__decitala-193✓0.550.6The fix correctly removes frag_type as a stored field and derives it from fragment.frag_type, but converting the dataclass to a regular class is non-minimal and the diff shows widespread whitespace reformatting that risks breaking unrelated code.
PMEAL__OpenPNM-2240✗0.30.85Agent made the core __init__ signatures mandatory but left IO/_new_object and other internal callers broken, causing 8 test failures, and did not complete the fix before hitting the cost limit.
PennyLaneAI__pennylane-5761✓0.850.8The fix adds the validate_device_wires transform to the adjoint validation program, mirroring execution behavior so global-wire measurements like qml.state() no longer raise an empty-wires error.
Project-MONAI__MONAI-313✓0.850.8Agent implemented both SqueezeDim and SqueezeDimd transforms matching the PR request, with imports and basic validation, though the dim>=-1 assertion is a minor oddity.
Project-MONAI__MONAI-4745✓0.90.9The agent correctly changed identity checks to issubclass checks, allowing MetaTensor (a torch.Tensor subclass) to be handled by torch.cat.
RDFLib__rdflib-2160✓0.850.8The fix skips getQName for the default context identifier, preventing the unwanted urn:x-rdflib: prefix from being registered during trig serialization, and the reproduction confirms success.
ReactiveX__RxPY-507✓0.850.9The agent correctly broadened the exception handler from Exception to BaseException in fromfuture.py, which forwards asyncio.CancelledError (a BaseException subclass in Python 3.8+) to on_error, matching the PR's suggested fix.
TACC__agavepy-108✓0.70.6Agent implemented files_history following existing patterns and tests pass, but the endpoint URL construction (files/v2/history/system/{path}) is likely incorrect since Agave's history endpoint requires a system ID and path, raising plausibility concerns.
Textualize__textual-2981✓1.00.95The agent correctly added event.stop() in Switch._on_click to prevent the Click event from bubbling, matching the issue's requirement and the Button widget's pattern.
Textualize__textual-3274✓0.90.85The fix resets `_mouse_hovering_over` to None in `_remove_option`, matching the existing `clear_options` pattern and preventing the IndexError when the hovered last option is removed.
TheUncleKai__bbutils-20✓0.80.75Agent added a separate app_space setting so the app name no longer reuses the tag's text_space width, and tests pass.
XKNX__xknx-1617✓0.90.85Agent implemented DPT 29 8-byte signed transcoders with proper struct packing, boundary validation, and registration in __init__.py, with tests passing.
adamtheturtle__todo-47✓0.70.6Agent added @login_required to all TODO CRUD endpoints, but the final state reverted the LOGIN_DISABLED/test-compatibility workaround, which may break tests requiring unauthenticated access.
agronholm__anyio-371✓0.850.8The fix correctly modifies the asyncio CancelScope.__exit__ to re-deliver cancellation to the parent when the exiting scope was itself cancelled, addressing the reported discrepancy; tests pass.
aio-libs__aiosmtpd-143✓0.90.9The agent added try/except handlers around the ASCII command decoding to return a 500 error instead of raising UnicodeDecodeError, matching the issue's suggested fix and passing tests.
aiogram__aiogram-1318✓0.90.85The fix correctly moves the raw_state read inside the isolation lock, preventing concurrent handlers from reading stale state before the lock is acquired.
asottile__babi-350✓0.70.6Agent added _start_x/_start_y adjustment logic in the replace-all path to account for line length changes, and tests pass; but the fix is somewhat complex and may have edge-case issues with the strict-less-than boundary and multi-line handling.
astropy__astropy-8713✓0.90.9The agent correctly changed Header.fromfile() to open filename strings in binary mode ('rb'), fixing the UnicodeDecodeError while the existing _from_blocks logic already handles binary input.
astropy__astropy-9188✓0.90.85The fix correctly moves the subok check to after the unit is determined from the value, resolving the UnitTypeError for log units while preserving existing behavior.
astropy__specutils-1053✗0.30.7Converter code changes are correct, but the ASDF schema for spectrum1d was not updated to allow the 'mask' field, so serialization will fail schema validation.
astropy__specutils-722✓0.850.8Added the missing with_radial_velocity and with_redshift methods to SpectralAxis, which the Spectrum1D setters call, resolving the AttributeError.
aws__chalice-1390✓0.90.85Made current_request and lambda_context thread-local via properties, addressing the thread-safety issue; tests pass.
beetbox__mediafile-45✓0.850.8Agent added file-like object support via mutagen's loadfile decorator and FileThing, with all 437 tests passing.
bmcfee__resampy-90✓0.850.8Fix correctly addresses the non-contiguous view issue by copying y_2d back into y when they don't share memory, applied to both resample and resample_nu.
bokeh__bokeh-1641✓1.00.95The agent correctly changed the wrapper to use Bokeh.$ as suggested in the issue, and verified it works across all modes including dev mode where Bokeh is locally scoped.
canonical__operator-360✓0.850.8Added comprehensive debug logging throughout autoload/use paths so charm authors can diagnose ImportError causes; one pre-existing test_cwd failure noted but unrelated to the logging change.
cdriehuys__django-rest-email-auth-19✓0.850.8The agent implemented the cleanup management command with appropriate settings and tests, though it also made unrelated compatibility edits to translation/URL imports.
cekit__cekit-494✓0.90.85Replaced the unsupported `git remote get-url` with the equivalent `git config --get remote.origin.url`, which works on older git versions causing the original error.
colour-science__colour-194✓0.90.85Agent implemented is_within_visible_spectrum, is_within_mesh_volume helper, and RGB_colourspace_visible_spectrum_coverage_MonteCarlo, refactored pointer_gamut to use the shared helper, and tests pass.
coverahealth__dataspec-42✓0.90.9The fix correctly replaces the enum-as-conformer with a helper that handles members, values, and names, resolving the reported issue.
cta-observatory__pyirf-231✓1.00.95The agent correctly filled the previously-empty n_events column by setting it to the group length within the existing groupby loop, matching the minimal fix needed.
dask__dask-11723✓0.850.8The fix adds np.asanyarray conversion in setitem to handle np.generic scalar chunks, addressing the issue while preserving masked array subclasses.
dask__dask-4834✓0.90.9The agent correctly modified eye() to use normalize_chunks, supporting chunks='auto' and non-uniform chunks, with proper diagonal offset handling via cumulative chunk boundaries.
dask__dask-9528✓1.00.95Added datetime.time to the identity normalize_token registration, matching the existing pattern for datetime.date/timedelta, which fixes the tokenization issue.
deppen8__pandas-vet-42✓0.850.8Agent added check_for_arithmetic_methods and check_for_comparison_methods covering all listed operators and wired them into visit_Call, matching the PR requirements.
di__vladiate-82✓0.850.9Implemented RowValidator and RowLengthValidator classes and integrated row_validators into Vlad with passing tests, though the agent modified test files despite instructions not to.
discos__simulators-307✗0.10.85The regex `^[A-Z0-9]` only matches a single leading character, not a full configuration string, so it would incorrectly accept malformed inputs and likely fail the actual tests; the fix is incomplete and likely incorrect.
docker__docker-py-2862✓0.950.95Changed short_id truncation from 10 to 12 characters across Model, Image, and RegistryData, matching Docker CLI's 12-char short ID behavior.
einsteinpy__einsteinpy-322✓0.850.8The agent extended the Tensor __init__ to accept scalar types (int, float, sympy Expr) by wrapping them in sympy.Array, enabling 0-order tensor support as requested.
elastic__elasticsearch-dsl-py-1416✓0.90.95Added a Boxplot aggregation class with the correct name, matching the existing pattern for metric aggs, and tests pass.
facelessuser__pymdown-extensions-2245✓0.550.6The fix adds an is_in_link check that preserves base64 URLs in links/images and passes existing tests, but the heuristic paren-counting approach is fragile and may mishandle edge cases like titles, nested parens, or multiple links.
falconry__falcon-1436✓0.90.9Added a `complete` attribute to Response and wired short-circuit logic into API's process_request and process_resource middleware loops, with tests passing.
fatiando__harmonica-269✗0.10.55Agent only added imports and a test conftest fixture; no actual variable density tesseroid implementation module was created, despite tests passing (likely pre-existing or stub).
faucetsdn__chewie-24✓0.80.75The fix makes the state machine logger a child of Chewie's logger via a log_prefix, enabling proper log propagation to Faucet's handlers; the change is minimal and backward-compatible.
feder-observatory__stellarphot-318✓0.850.8The fix correctly resets the widget's internal _value after _init_ui() so reselecting an existing item triggers change handlers and updates the UI.
fitbenchmarking__fitbenchmarking-320✓1.00.95The fix correctly changes the weighted chi-squared from multiplying by errors to dividing by errors, matching the standard χ² = Σ((r/σ)²) formula.
fjosw__pyerrors-145✗0.30.85The fix only guards the warning logic but does not handle None in the symmetrization loop itself, so the core exception when content[t] or content[T-t] is None remains unaddressed.
florimondmanca__djangorestframework-api-key-35✓0.850.8Added nullable expiry_date field with migration, implemented has_expired property checking against timezone.now(), and updated is_valid to reject expired keys; tests pass.
fniessink__next-action-140✓0.850.8The agent modified write_config_file to use the parsed namespace (file, number, reference, style) and handled edge cases like --all and multiple files, matching the PR requirements.
force-h2020__force-bdss-166✓0.850.8The base class now scans for traits with changes_slots=True metadata and auto-binds them to fire the changes_slots event, satisfying the PR; minor non-minimal test edits (Function->Callable) are tangential but harmless.
frictionlessdata__goodtables-py-315✓0.850.8The fix adds a local-file-not-found check in the inspector's exception handler, producing a clear source-error for non-existent paths instead of a confusing format-error, matching the PR's intent.
garnaat__placebo-21✓0.950.9Added prefix support to Pill.__init__, attach, and both file path methods, matching the requested filename format and passing all tests.
google__mobly-328✓0.90.85The fix correctly wraps the logcat file path in double quotes in the shell command, preventing the shell from truncating the path at spaces in the device model name.
hgrecco__pint-pandas-204✓0.850.8The astype fix returns a numpy array for non-extension dtypes, resolving the float dtype and _formatter issues, with the agent verifying via tests.
hugovk__pypistats-13✓0.850.8Added a _percent function that computes a percent column and reordered _tabulate so percent appears before downloads, matching the PR requirements.
hylang__hy-2522✓0.950.9The fix correctly changes the case-sensitive 'j' check to a case-insensitive one, ensuring uppercase 'J' suffixes also trigger the NaN/Inf capitalization validation.
iterative__dvc-1223✓0.90.85The agent correctly refactored changed_cache into a per-file check and added directory cache entry verification, matching the PR requirement.
iterative__dvc-4185✓0.950.95The fix correctly changes the falsy-value bug in fill_values by checking key existence instead of value truthiness, resolving the dvc status false-positive for params like eval.filter_limitup=false.
jnothman__UpSetPlot-50✓0.850.8The agent implemented DataFrame support with sum_over, add_catplot for distribution plots, dynamic subset plots grid, and intersections disabling via plot size, matching the PR requirements.
jordaneremieff__mangum-186✗0.30.85The fix logic is correct, but the agent left a failing test (test_aws_alb_set_cookies) and explicitly refused to fix it, claiming the test expectation was wrong despite the task stating tests were already correct.
marshmallow-code__apispec-677✓0.850.8Added a pluck2properties handler that flattens Pluck fields to the plucked field's type (with array wrapping for many=True) and short-circuits nested2properties for Pluck, correctly resolving the issue.
matplotlib__matplotlib-15826✓0.90.9The fix correctly adds a string check to prevent a single color string whose length matches len(x) from being treated as an array of per-bar colors.
matplotlib__matplotlib-17892✓0.70.7Agent added _check_color_like validation in colors.py and called it in Line2D's set_color/set_markeredgecolor/set_markerfacecolor/set_markerfacecoloralt, achieving immediate validation as requested, but fix is incomplete (no facecolor/edgecolor on other artists) and relies on possibly non-existent cbook._str_equal helper.
matplotlib__matplotlib-18266✓0.90.9The fix correctly handles empty paths in Path.get_extents by returning Bbox.null() when xys is empty, matching the upstream fix and resolving the scatter(marker='') crash.
matplotlib__matplotlib-18445✓0.850.85Added a `_draw_was_started` flag set in `_init_draw` and a `__del__` warning, with subclasses calling super()._init_draw(); correctly implements the requested behavior.
matthewwardrop__formulaic-43✓0.850.8The fix correctly addresses category ordering and reduced_rank handling during transformation, and the reproduction script now passes for both categorical and string inputs.
mgcth__mysgen-59✓0.850.8Agent implemented the mangle_image_name option with sorting and hashing, and all 47 tests pass; the implementation plausibly matches the PR requirements.
mhostetter__galois-324✓0.850.8Agent replaced None returns with RuntimeError in pollard_p1/pollard_rho and updated factors() to use try/except, matching the test expectations; minor deviation from PR's ValueError wording but consistent with repo's actual approach.
microsoft__debugpy-570✓0.90.85The agent correctly fixed SafeRepr._repr_dict to preserve dict insertion order on Python 3.6+ instead of unconditionally sorting keys, consistent with the existing DictResolver fix.
microsoft__electionguard-python-654✓0.850.8The fix normalizes hex strings via int conversion in _convert_to_element, ensuring equal values produce consistent to_hex() and hash_elems() output; the tally.py change is an unrelated but reasonable compatibility fix.
mikedh__trimesh-1331✓0.70.7Fix correctly addresses the single-material UV regression by using mesh.vertices/faces directly when faces is the full array, but leaves multi-material UV handling broken and uses a shape-based heuristic.
mikgroup__sigpy-58✓0.850.8Replaced unsupported RandomState with numba-compatible np.random.seed/random calls and added get_state/set_state to preserve global numpy state when seed is specified.
mit-ll-responsible-ai__hydra-zen-299✓0.70.7Fix correctly detects dataclass default_factory fields and calls the factory to populate the signature, resolving the reported error, though it relies on a private dataclasses sentinel and may have edge-case gaps.
mitmproxy__pdoc-710✓0.850.8The fix adds a type check to skip non-string entries in __all__, directly resolving the TypeError from getattr, and existing tests pass.
mitmproxy__pdoc-754✓0.950.95The fix correctly guards the `in` operator with an `isinstance(qual, str)` check, resolving the TypeError for non-string `__qualname__` values like `_SentinelObject`, and the reproduction confirms docs generate successfully.
mkdocs__mkdocs-3700✓0.950.95The fix correctly handles the None returned by yaml.load for empty mkdocs_theme.yml files by converting it to an empty dict before calling .pop().
modin-project__modin-1842✓0.70.7The fix correctly addresses the TypeError by checking element types before containment and handles Series-to-pandas conversion in default_to_pandas, with edge case tests passing, though the solution is somewhat verbose and the size() fallback may be broader than strictly necessary.
mwouts__jupytext-717✓0.90.85Added `\s*` after `^` to the magic-detection regexes so indented magics are recognized and escaped, matching the existing pattern for help/bash commands and passing the relevant tests.
nathan-v__aws_okta_keyman-72✓0.850.8The fix reassigns roleIdx after sorting so the displayed index matches the actual role, correctly resolving the wrong-role-selection bug.
ncclient__ncclient-412✓0.850.8Added argument validation for default_operation, test_option, and error_option, and added test-only support with :validate:1.1 capability check, matching the PR requirements.
networkx__networkx-5354✓0.70.7The fix reorders the position computation before the theta update and uses a larger initial theta, making all consecutive node distances (including the first) approximately equal; tests pass, though the magic formula is somewhat ad hoc.
networkx__networkx-7332✓0.90.9Added a `seed` parameter to `generate_random_paths` using the standard `np_random_state` decorator and replaced `np.random` calls with the seeded generator, enabling reproducibility.
nilearn__nilearn-2723✓0.850.8Agent implemented fetch_atlas_juelich with helper functions, registered it in __init__.py, and verified it works including downloading from the real URL.
nltk__nltk-3205✓1.00.95The fix correctly adds IndexError to the caught exceptions, resolving the numpy array indexing error described in the PR.
nose-devs__nose2-245✗0.20.85The fix only modifies _makeFailedTest to accept exc_info tuples, but no callers were updated to pass exc_info tuples, so generator/loader errors still lose traceback detail.
numpy__numpydoc-101✓0.850.8The fix adds context (object name and source file) to the 'Unknown section' warning, mirroring the #95 fix pattern, with a sensible fallback when _obj is unavailable.
oasis-open__cti-python-stix2-344✓0.90.85The fix correctly checks the error listener's err_strings after parsing and raises a ParseException with the validator's error messages, propagating helpful errors as requested.
openforcefield__openff-toolkit-1609✓0.90.85The fix correctly makes the identical-molecule shortcut respect return_atom_map, resolving the inconsistent behavior described in the PR.
osbuild__osbuild-1556✓0.850.8The fix adds a custom YAML dumper that emits lists in flow style, producing the cloud-init-compatible `datasource_list: [Azure]` format described in the issue.
peterbe__hashin-111✓0.850.8The fix detects when a single .txt file is passed as a package with --update-all and reinterprets it as the requirements file, matching the issue's intent and passing all tests.
pgmpy__pgmpy-1454✓0.850.85The fix deduplicates interface nodes before generating combinations, eliminating the self-loop error, and all 40 tests pass.
postlund__pyatv-920✓0.90.85Added __eq__ to interface.Playing and made both MRP and DMAP push uppers compare against previous state before dispatching, matching the PR's suggested generic approach.
pvlib__pvanalytics-73✓1.00.95The agent correctly changed the divisor from 60 to 3600 to convert seconds to hours, matching the issue's suggested fix.
pybel__pybel-413✓0.850.8Agent implemented a two-layer PyNPA exporter (PPI + transcriptional layers) with supporting getters/node_utils and Gene.get_rna(), and all tests pass.
pydata__xarray-2845✓1.00.95The fix correctly changes swap_dims to build the new index from the new dimension's variable (variables[new_name]) instead of the old one, restoring the expected Int64Index after swapping back from a datetime coordinate.
pyiron__pyiron_base-267✓0.90.85The fix correctly replaces the broken direct HDF path access with DataContainer.from_hdf(), which handles the new storage format and maintains backward compatibility.
pymeasure__pymeasure-876✓0.850.8The fix correctly ingests preprocess_reply in CommonBase.__init__ and Instrument.__init__, stores it as self.preprocess_reply, and applies it in values() as a fallback, restoring the broken functionality.
pypa__pip-6515✓0.90.85The agent correctly added get_remote_call_options() to all SVN command methods (export, fetch_new, switch, update), which provides --force-interactive for SVN 1.8+ and --non-interactive as needed, matching the PR requirements.
python-pillow__Pillow-4094✓0.950.95The agent correctly changed float division to integer division in makeSpiderHeader, matching the PR's suggested fix, and verified it across multiple edge cases.
python-pillow__Pillow-6787✓0.70.7The fix adds a disposal=2 check comparing against the previous actual frame so transparent frames that differ from the previous frame are preserved; tests pass, though the approach is somewhat verbose and may not perfectly match upstream's minimal solution.
python-pillow__Pillow-6890✓0.850.8The fix correctly handles IFDRational/float values in write_byte, resolving the TypeError during exif serialization, though it's slightly narrow by only patching write_byte rather than the root type-coercion logic.
python-pillow__Pillow-7948✓0.850.8Fix correctly excludes malformed IPTC_NAA_CHUNK tags (non-BYTE/UNDEFINED type) from being passed to libtiff, preventing the segfault, and existing tests pass.
qutech__qupulse-625✓0.90.85The fix casts `time` to float before subtracting from sample_times, preventing TimeType propagation into the body waveform's lambdified function.
radiocosmology__alpenhorn-269✓0.80.75Added a --once CLI flag and modified update_loop to run a single iteration then wait for I/O via queue.join() before exiting, plausibly satisfying the run-then-exit requirement.
repobee__repobee-236✓0.850.8Agent added an _OrderedFormatter that reorders CLI help args (command-specific first, configurable last) and applied it to all subparsers, plausibly resolving the reorder request.
repobee__repobee-538✓0.850.85APIError and descendants were moved to repobee_plug._exceptions extending PlugError, exposed at top level, and re-exported from _repobee.exception for backward compatibility.
requests__requests-oauthlib-279✓0.70.7The token setter now sets self.auth to a no-op callable when a token is present, which prevents requests from falling back to netrc credentials, addressing the issue; however using a lambda rather than the OAuth2 auth class is a non-ideal workaround compared to the PR's suggested fix.
seek-oss__aec-376✓0.850.8Agent added empty-name guards raising NoInstancesError in terminate/start/stop/modify/logs/tag, preventing mass operations; relies on existing NoInstancesError behavior and tests pass.
spacetelescope__jwst-8575✓0.850.8The fix correctly extends the photom step's existing skip-hook to also catch ImageModel inputs for NIS_SOSS, raising DataModelTypeError that PhotomStep already handles to cleanly skip, matching the issue's requirement.
sphinx-doc__sphinx-10429✓0.90.85jQuery files were upgraded from 3.5.1 to 3.6.0 (both jquery.js and jquery-3.6.0.js), matching the PR request, though changes were made via git operations rather than str_replace_editor edits.
sphinx-doc__sphinx-5333✓0.90.9The fix correctly guards access to __origin__ for typing.Any and falls back to repr, resolving the AttributeError in both format_annotation_new and format_annotation_old.
spulec__freezegun-245✓0.70.7The fix correctly addresses the ignore issue by replacing time/datetime module references in ignored modules with real copies, though the implementation is somewhat complex and may have edge cases with nested contexts.
sqlfluff__sqlfluff-978✓0.850.8The fix correctly uses source_pos_marker to align noqa directive line numbers with the original source file, matching the existing pattern in errors.py and passing noqa tests.
stfc__fparser-263✓0.90.85The fix correctly moves the None check outside the except block so that None items from the FIFO buffer are handled, addressing the critical error at end-of-file.
streamlink__streamlink-5762✓0.850.8The fix correctly captures the full id slug (e.g. 204-sctv) and type from the URL and uses them to build the tokens URL, addressing the 403 error.
sympy__sympy-13818✓0.90.9Added _eval_is_nonnegative to binomial returning True when n and k are nonnegative integers, matching the PR requirement; existing tests pass except a pre-existing XFAIL.
sympy__sympy-14278✓0.850.8Added a correct branch in Abs.eval for complex base^complex exponent using |base|^re(exp)*exp(-arg(base)*im(exp)), verified against the PR case and edge cases.
sympy__sympy-20342✓1.00.95The agent applied the exact one-line fix from the PR description, swapping the dot product argument order in the project function, and verified tests pass.
sympy__sympy-21702✓0.850.8The fix in gcd_terms handles Atom types correctly, resolving the is_finite exception for matrix element expressions.
sympy__sympy-23478✓0.850.9The fix correctly catches PolynomialError from roots() calls in equivalence_hypergeometric and returns None, allowing classify_ode to proceed without crashing on non-polynomial coefficients.
sympy__sympy-25862✓0.90.85The agent correctly removed the buggy `mrv(exp(e1 * (b1 - 1)), x)` optimization that incorrectly approximated log(1+u)≈u, exactly as suggested in the PR, and verified the fix with tests.
sympy__sympy-27559✓0.950.95Correctly swapped p and (1-p) in pdf, CF, MGF, updated docs/examples, and fixed the pymc sampling mu formula to match the success-probability convention.
tobymao__sqlglot-1089✓0.850.85The agent correctly mapped Spark's AGGREGATE to exp.Reduce and added REDUCE generation/parsing for Presto/Trino, with appropriate handling of the optional finish argument.
tobymao__sqlglot-4067✓0.90.85Added a TSQL-specific dpipe_sql override that emits '+' instead of '||', correctly addressing the string concatenation issue with a minimal change.
twisted__twisted-12280✓0.90.9Added a setter for the parents property that assigns to _parents, directly resolving the AttributeError reported by foolscap's CopiedFailure.setCopyableState.
typesafehub__conductr-cli-514✓0.70.7The fix parses multi-section credentials files and selects the Bintray realm section, addressing the issue, though the implementation is somewhat convoluted with regex workarounds.
wemake-services__wemake-python-styleguide-1649✗0.20.9The final test run shows 6 failing tests for empty string overuse cases, indicating the fix breaks existing tests by over-broadly ignoring empty strings.
wemake-services__wemake-python-styleguide-3117✓0.850.8The fix correctly skips WPS520 when the Compare node is inside an assert by using get_closest_parent, and preserves the violation in other contexts.
wemake-services__wemake-python-styleguide-3159✓0.90.85The fix correctly uses get_context() to skip variables in nested functions/classes, addressing WPS210, and tests were updated to verify the new behavior.
yevhen-m__flake8-fancy-header-6✗0.20.85The agent's fix makes empty files produce 0 errors, but the existing test expects 1 error, so the change breaks the test suite and contradicts the actual desired behavior.
All-Hands-AI__openhands-aci-55✗0.30.6The implementation only annotates directories at depth 2 with item counts, but does not add file/folder type info to all entries as the PR requests, and the depth-based logic using path parts is fragile; likely fails existing tests expecting plain listings.
Cadair__parfive-73✓0.90.85Added a working simple_download classmethod matching the PR's intent, with sensible defaults and documentation.
aio-libs__yarl-1340✓0.90.85Agent implemented __sub__ operator and calculate_relative_path helper with proper scheme/netloc validation and edge case handling, matching the feature request.
awslabs__aws-cfn-template-flip-43✓0.850.8The fix adds a LOOKS_LIKE_NUMBER regex to force single-quoting of numeric-looking strings in the YAML dumper, resolving the inconsistent quoting described in the issue.
clld__clldutils-10✓0.850.8Agent created a licenses.py module with SPDX license data, a License namedtuple, and a find() function supporting lookup by id, name, and URL, matching the PR requirements and passing the relevant tests.
fujiisoup__py3nj-8✓0.850.8The fix corrects the drc6j argument mapping to match the documented 6j expansion formula, and the PR case now returns ~0.0483 matching online calculators.
reanahub__reana-client-652✓0.850.8Added a working `prune` CLI command and corresponding API client function with include-inputs/include-outputs options, matching the issue's requirements and existing code patterns.
rollbar__pyrollbar-470✓0.850.8Implemented custom_transforms setting with priority-based sorting across all transform classes, matching the rollbar.js transform feature; tests pass.
sympy__sympy-18063✓0.90.85The fix correctly replaces sympify with _sympify in Expr.__eq__, preventing string evaluation of unknown objects' reprs while preserving proper equality semantics.
takeontom__PyPeri-28✓0.950.9Added a new parser for username/broadcast_id URLs, registered it before the username-only parser, and all tests pass.
tobymao__sqlglot-2038✓0.850.8Added ENUM8/ENUM16 tokens, types, keyword mappings, type mappings, and updated parser to parse enum value pairs via _parse_equality, enabling ClickHouse Enum/Enum8/Enum16 parsing with passing tests.
